'''Gergris''' was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Halthor sector/Legends|Halthor sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
[[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Trophan Thanis]] of the [[Noonian system]] petitioned Moff Gergris for an increased [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] presence in the system due to increasing attacks by [[Rebel privateer]]s.
